name: www.granosycereales.com.co
message: Granos y Cereales de Colombia S.A. is a Colombian agro-industrial company with over 40 years of experience in the food sector, specializing in the processing, classification, packaging, and distribution of rice and dry legumes. The company is committed to providing high-quality rice to Colombian families, aiming to nourish their dreams. With a strong presence in the agro-industrial sector, it plays a significant role in the local market. Their product offerings include various rice brands such as Arroz Tailandés, Sabrosón, and Mi Arroz.
